[8:6] And it came to pass at the end of forty days, that Noah opened the window of the ark which he had made: 8:7 And he sent forth a raven, which went forth to and fro, until the waters were dried up from off the earth.
ed: To calm or soothe; to lessen in intensity or severity.
cd: 使平息；緩和。
ex: 「asswaged」是指使某事物的激烈程度或強度減輕，通常用於描述情緒、憤怒或其他強烈情感的緩解過程。在這段經文中，它指的是風吹過大地後，洪水逐漸減輕的情況。「asswaged」可以理解為「使平息」或「緩和」。
